Company.title: Company
Company.description: Represents a single company dossier for a facility. It contains high-level information about the company.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Company entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this company.

customerId.description: Identifier for the customer group this company belongs to.

name.description: A user-defined name for the company or facility analysis.

address.description: An optional address of the company.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the company was created.

SubstanceInventoryItem.title: SubstanceInventoryItem
SubstanceInventoryItem.description: Represents a single chemical substance present in a specific company's inventory.

productName.description: The name of the product or substance.

sevesoCategoryIds.description: Array of Seveso category IDs the substance falls into.

arieCategoryIds.description: Array of ARIE category IDs the substance falls into.

isNamedSubstance.description: Flag indicating if it is a named substance.

namedSubstanceName.description: The name of the substance if it's a named one.

quantity.description: The quantity of the substance present, in tons.

uid.description: The user's unique ID from Firebase Authentication.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

customerId.description: Identifier for grouping users into a single customer account.

customerName.description: Display name for the customer group.

definition.description: Stores public profile information for each user. The document ID is the same as the user's auth UID. Access is restricted, except for the admin user who has read/write access to this entire collection to manage user properties like groups and disabled status.

Stores company profile information. Documents contain a `userId` for ownership and a `customerId` for group sharing. Write access is restricted to the owner. Read access is granted to any user within the same customer group.
Contains chemical substances belonging to a specific company. Access is restricted based on the ownership and customer group of the parent company.

params.name: companyId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent company.

params.name: substanceId
params.description: The unique identifier for the substance inventory item.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure is designed around user ownership and customer-level sharing. The `users` collection now includes `customerId`, `customerName`, and `disabled` fields to facilitate grouping and account management by an admin. The `companies` collection also includes a `customerId`, which is used to enable query-based sharing of company data among users of the same customer group. Security rules enforce that users can only see companies matching their `customerId`, and only write to companies they personally own (`userId`). The admin role (`post@wastelcompany.eu`) has special privileges to manage user profiles.
